artPrompt: A grim mid-century municipal annex building seen across a rain-slicked street, its squat concrete facade and rows of dark windows looming under a bruised sky, a single cyan-lit doorway glowing far away. Puddles mirror the cold fluorescence; a bare directional arrow on a blank smudged plaque points uselessly off-frame. Wet pavement rushes toward the distant entrance in steep perspective, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: The Annex (See Other Building)
text:
The Annex enters the battlefield tapped unless you control two or more other lands. (It's across the street. Bring an umbrella.)
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
Whenever an opponent flips a coin, you may scry 1. The Annex saw it. The Annex sees everything from over there.
flavorText: "That's handled at the Annex." "Where's the Annex?" "See the main building."
